lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.

The vehicle is in fair condition. There are visible scratches and minor dents on the exterior. The interior shows signs of regular use and wear. It is currently operational, though some mechanical components may need attention in the near future.

The vehicle is in poor condition. The body has significant rust and several large dents. Mechanically, the car requires major repairs to the engine and transmission. The interior is heavily worn with tears in the seating and carpet.

This vehicle is in absolute mint condition and has been maintained to the highest standards. The exterior is flawless, with original factory paint that retains a deep, mirror-like shine and no visible imperfections. Inside, the interior is pristine, with no wear on the upholstery or controls. Mechanically, the car is perfect, having received regular service and climate-controlled storage. It drives like new and represents a rare opportunity to own a showroom-quality example of this model.

This vehicle is in impeccable, mint condition, essentially indistinguishable from a brand-new model. The exterior finish is flawless, with the original paint retaining a deep, mirror-like luster and absolutely no chips, scratches, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains in a pristine state; the premium upholstery is supple and shows no signs of wear, while all interior trim pieces are spotless and free of any scuffs. Mechanically, the car is perfect, having been meticulously maintained with a full service history and stored in a climate-controlled garage. Every feature, including the high-end audio system and all electronic driver aids, functions exactly as it did the day it left the factory. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning buyer to own a vehicle that has been preserved to the highest possible standard, offering a true showroom-quality experience.
Unlock the potential of this budget-friendly project car! This vehicle is a fantastic opportunity for a DIY enthusiast or someone looking for a fixer

We are pleased to present this expertly maintained vehicle, offering a superior balance of performance and prestige. This unit exhibits commendable mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, reflecting a history of diligent care. Engineered for reliability and refined comfort, it represents a distinguished acquisition for the selective motorist seeking uncompromising value.

Hey friends! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a gem. It’s in really solid shape and has plenty of life left in it—perfect for someone looking for a dependable, stylish set of wheels without the brand-new price tag. It drives so smoothly and has been loved and looked after. Come take it for a spin, you won't be disappointed!

Offered is a mechanically robust 2008 Corvette Z06, featuring the formidable 7.0L LS7 V8 powerplant equipped with a dry-sump lubrication system and titanium connecting rods. This chassis utilizes a lightweight hydroformed aluminum frame and magnesium engine cradle to optimize torsional rigidity and weight distribution. Power is delivered through a Tremec TR6060 six-speed manual transmission to a limited-slip rear differential, ensuring precise torque vectoring. The vehicle retains its factory-tuned suspension with transverse composite leaf springs and speed-sensitive power steering. Recent maintenance has addressed the valvetrain and cooling system to ensure peak operating temperatures under load. While the exterior displays minor patina consistent with a driver’s car, the powertrain remains in exceptional health, offering the high-revving, atmospheric performance characteristic of this platform.
Used car. Good condition. Maintenance up to date. Clean title. Reliable daily driver.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between performance and luxury. The exterior remains in impressive shape, sporting its original factory finish with only minor road wear consistent with careful use. Inside, you’ll find a pristine, smoke-free cabin featuring supple leather upholstery and high-quality trim that has been treated regularly to preserve its texture. All electronic components—from the responsive infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control—function exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is robust; the engine runs smoothly and has been serviced strictly according to the manufacturer's schedule, with a comprehensive folder of maintenance records included. Most recently, the vehicle received a fresh set of premium tires and a full fluid service. It drives straight, shifts seamlessly, and offers a quiet, composed ride. This is a reliable, turn-key example ready for its next owner to enjoy without delay.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, offering a superior balance of mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This automobile has been thoroughly inspected to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for performance and reliability. Featuring a clean interior and a well-preserved exterior finish, it represents a significant value for the discerning buyer seeking a dependable, high-caliber driving experience. This is an exceptional opportunity to secure a refined vehicle at a highly competitive valuation.

Presented in commendable condition, this vehicle exemplifies a harmonious balance of performance and prestige. It has been meticulously curated to ensure both mechanical reliability and aesthetic appeal, offering an exceptional driving experience for the discerning professional. This represents a premier opportunity to secure a high-caliber automobile that maintains a commanding presence on the road.

Hey everyone! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been super reliable for me—perfect for someone who wants a dependable car that still looks great on the road. I’ve kept up with the maintenance, so it’s ready to hit the highway today! Come take it for a spin, you’re going to love it!

Used car. Good condition. Clean title. Well-maintained. Reliable performance.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of luxury and performance. The exterior retains a deep, glossy shine with only minor road-wear consistent with careful use, while the interior features premium upholstery that remains supple and clean. Mechanically, this car is in excellent health, benefiting from a documented service history and recent preventative maintenance. Every feature, from the dual-zone climate control to the responsive infotainment system, functions exactly as intended. It drives smoothly, shifts crisply, and provides a quiet, comfortable ride. Ideal for a discerning buyer looking for a reliable, high-quality vehicle that has been treated with respect.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents an exceptional value proposition for the discerning driver. Featuring a comprehensive service history and presented in superior mechanical health, this automobile delivers a refined driving experience that exceeds expectations for its class. We invite you to experience the uncompromising quality and reliable performance of this distinguished model firsthand.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, offering a distinguished combination of reliability and sophisticated engineering. Having undergone a rigorous inspection to ensure its mechanical integrity, this specimen remains in commendable condition, reflecting a history of diligent care. It represents an optimal acquisition for the discerning driver seeking premium performance and lasting value.

Hi everyone! I’m parting ways with my favorite set of wheels, and she’s a total gem! This car has been so reliable and is still running like a champ. It’s in really solid shape and has clearly been well-loved, making it the perfect catch for someone looking for a dependable ride that's ready to hit the road. I'm honestly sad to see it go, but I know it’ll make its next owner very happy. Can’t wait for you to take it for a spin!

This E46 M3 is a purist's driver, featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six equipped with individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing. The chassis remains composed thanks to reinforced subframe mounting points and a factory limited-slip differential that ensures optimal torque distribution. Suspension geometry is sharp, maintaining the signature M-division balance between turn-in precision and rear-end stability. Recent mechanical overhauls include a cooling system refresh and valve clearance adjustment, ensuring the engine pulls hard to its 8,000 RPM redline. While displaying honest wear typical of a well-loved performance vehicle, the drivetrain is exceptionally tight and responsive.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Well-maintained engine. Clean interior. Minor paint chips. Reliable daily driver.

This impeccably maintained 2018 Executive Touring Sedan offers the perfect balance of luxury and reliability. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine with only minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with careful road use. Inside, the premium leather upholstery has been meticulously cared for in a smoke-free environment, and all onboard technology—including the premium sound system and navigation—operates flawlessly. Under the hood, the vehicle has been serviced strictly according to the manufacturer’s schedule, ensuring a smooth, responsive drive with a quiet engine and crisp gear shifts. With recent brake service and tires showing substantial tread life remaining, this vehicle is turn-key and ready for its next chapter. It represents an excellent opportunity for a buyer seeking a dependable, high-quality vehicle without the new-car price tag.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies consistent performance and structural integrity. This specimen has been vetted to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for mechanical reliability and aesthetic appeal. Offering a refined driving experience and a comprehensive service history, this vehicle represents a premier acquisition for the discerning motorist seeking both value and distinction.

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking an optimal balance of performance and value. Meticulously maintained and showcasing consistent mechanical integrity, this model remains in commendable condition both inside and out. It has been subjected to a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our dealership's exacting standards for reliability and roadworthiness. Featuring a well-preserved interior and a clean history, this offering provides a sophisticated driving experience that justifies its standing as a superior choice in the pre-owned market.

Hey there! I'm looking to find a new home for my trusty ride! It’s been such a reliable companion and is still in really wonderful shape. It runs smoothly, looks great, and has been well-loved and taken care of. Perfect for someone looking for a solid, dependable car that’s ready to hit the road today. Come take it for a spin—you're going to love it!

This driver-focused machine features a mid-mounted, naturally aspirated 3.4L flat-six engine delivering linear power through a precise six-speed manual gearbox. The chassis remains taut, benefiting from a recent refresh of the control arm bushings and an inspection of the integrated dry-sump lubrication system. Equipped with a mechanical limited-slip differential and staggered alloy wheels, the vehicle offers exceptional lateral grip and communicative steering feedback. While showing minor aesthetic patina consistent with its mileage,
Used vehicle in good condition. Regular maintenance performed. Clean title and interior. No known mechanical issues.

This meticulously maintained executive sedan offers a perfect blend of luxury and reliable performance. The exterior retains a deep, mirror-like luster in its original metallic finish, though a discerning eye might spot a few minor stone chips on the front fascia consistent with careful highway use. Inside, the premium leather cabin remains supple and inviting; while there is light natural creasing on the driver’s bolster, the interior is free of tears or odors. All electronic features, including the panoramic sunroof, navigation system, and dual-zone climate control, function exactly as intended. Under the hood, the engine delivers a smooth, responsive drive, backed by a comprehensive service history and a recently completed multi-point inspection. With a fresh set of premium tires and firm, responsive braking, this vehicle is mechanically sound and ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately. It represents an excellent opportunity for a buyer seeking a high-end driving experience that has been cared for with pride.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies both mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This automobile has been curated for the discerning driver who values consistent performance and sophisticated styling. Having undergone a comprehensive professional inspection, the vehicle remains in commendable condition, offering a seamless blend of reliability and prestige. A premier selection for those seeking a high-caliber driving experience and long-term value.
